description_long: This object is a handheld chainsaw with a long, narrow guide bar and a visible cutting chain along its edge. The body of the chainsaw is boxy and robust, featuring a mix of metallic and plastic components, with a prominent handle at the rear and a secondary handle on top for two-handed operation. The casing appears to be painted in a combination of blue, white, and black, with some areas showing wear and grime, suggesting heavy use. There is a visible brand logo and text on the guide bar, rendered in red, though the details are partially obscured. The rear handle is angled and ergonomically shaped, while the top handle is more rectangular, providing stability and control. The overall design is functional and rugged, suitable for demanding urban or industrial environments.
description: A rugged, handheld chainsaw with a long guide bar, blue and white casing, and dual handles for control. The object shows signs of use and features a visible brand logo on the bar.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the full length of the guide bar, the brand logo, and both the rear and top handles.
description_view_1: Side view from the bar tip, highlighting the narrow profile and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: Right-side view displaying the opposite side of the guide bar, the casing, and the rear handle's ergonomic angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the casing and the rear handle, with the guide bar extending away.
attribute_brand_logo: A red logo and text are visible on the left side of the guide bar, featuring a circular emblem and stylized writing, though the exact brand name is partially obscured.
attribute_handle_design: Two handles: a rear handle with an ergonomic, angled grip and a rectangular top handle for two-handed operation; both appear to be made of plastic with possible rubberized sections.
